description: Mobile Application Management (MAM) app protection policies help prevent both intentional and unintentional data leaks while making sure users stay productive. App protection policies are enforced in each managed application and apply even when an application is accessed on a device not managed by Microsoft Intune.
userImpact: Company data will be protected across selected applications. Policies do not apply when a user is using an application in a personal context.

managementTemplateSteps.description: Enable app protection policy for iOS devices to protect tenant data within core applications. Mobile Application Management (MAM) app protection policies help prevent both intentional and unintentional data leaks while making sure users stay productive. App protection policies are enforced in each managed application and apply even when an application is accessed on a device not managed by Microsoft Intune.

settings.name: description
settings.value: Enable app protection policy for iOS devices to protect your tenants' data within core applications. Mobile Application Management (MAM) app protection policies help prevent both intentional and unintentional data loss while making sure your tenants' users stay productive. App protection policies also protect your tenants' company data accessed by devices that aren't managed directly by your organization.

settings.name: periodOnlineBeforeAccessCheck
settings.displayName: Recheck the access requirements after (minutes of inactivity)

settings.name: allowedOutboundDataTransferDestinations
settings.displayName: Send org data to other apps

settings.name: organizationalCredentialsRequired
settings.displayName: Work or school account credentials for access

settings.name: allowedOutboundClipboardSharingLevel
settings.displayName: Restrict cut, copy, and paste between apps

settings.name: periodBeforePinReset
settings.displayName: PIN reset after number of days

settings.name: disableAppPinIfDevicePinIsSet
settings.displayName: App PIN when device PIN is set

settings.name: pinRequiredInsteadOfBiometricTimeout
settings.displayName: Override biometrics with PIN after timeout

settings.name: previousPinBlockCount
settings.displayName: Select number of previous PIN values to maintain

lambdaDefinitions.value: select case when data = '' then '' else '{"target": {"@odata.type": "#microsoft.graph.groupAssignmentTarget","groupId": "' || data || '"}}' end from arg0
select case when data = '' then '' else '{"target": {"@odata.type": "#microsoft.graph.exclusionGroupAssignmentTarget","groupId": "' || data || '"}}' end from arg0

select 'Enable app protection policy for iOS devices to protect your tenants'' data within core applications. App protection policies also protect your tenants'' company data accessed by devices that aren''t managed directly by your organization. '

managementTemplateSteps.description: Enable app protection policy for Android devices to protect tenant data within core applications. Mobile Application Management (MAM) app protection policies help prevent both intentional and unintentional data leaks while making sure users stay productive. App protection policies are enforced in each managed application and apply even when an application is accessed on a device not managed by Microsoft Intune.
